# Curated KNOWN-FUND denylist -- frozen snapshot (2026-06-12).
# INDEPENDENT input for the universe_no_known_funds gate: confirmed ETF/ETN/leveraged/
# commodity-fund products. Freezing the list makes the gate independent of the live
# is_etf_like regex -- if someone weakens the regex, drifts the builder, or a known fund
# is re-introduced as a universe member, the frozen denylist still catches it.
# Maintenance: APPEND newly-confirmed funds; never silently shrink. Format: SYMBOL<TAB>name
# Count at snapshot: 5284 funds out of 13864 named assets.
